title: TOON Akash Devnet Faucet Contract
description: Wire-shape contract between the dev-faucet HTTP service (packages/faucet/src/index.js, deployed via deploy/akash/faucet.sdl.yaml) and its consumers (foreign-client pods, third-party developers, ad-hoc smoke tests). Drift = build break. See _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/49-2-akash-devnet-faucets-and-ui.md § "Schema-Contract Discipline".

EvmAddress.description: 0x-prefixed 40-hex EVM address. Regex must stay in sync with packages/faucet/src/index.js SOLANA_PUBKEY_RE/EVM_ADDRESS_RE and packages/hub/src/api/routes/faucet.ts:119-120.

SolanaAddress.description: base58-encoded Solana pubkey, 32-44 chars, no 0OIl. Regex must stay in sync.

Chain.description: Settlement chain — 'evm' targets the Akash-Anvil lease, 'solana' targets the Akash-Solana lease.

TruncatedAddress.description: Display-truncated address (first-6 + last-4 hex/base58). Output-only; never accepted as input.

recipient.description: EVM or Solana address — validated against the per-chain regex AFTER chain is dispatched. Schema-level shape is just 'non-empty string'; chain-aware validation lives in the handler.

amount.description: Whole USDC to drip (decimals=6 on Solana, decimals=18 on Mock USDC anvil). Optional; defaults to TOKEN_AMOUNT env (10000 on EVM) or SOL_USDC_AMOUNT env (100 on Solana) if omitted.

address.description: EVM or Solana address — chain inferred from the request path (/faucet/evm or /faucet/sol). Validated against the per-chain regex.

amount.description: Whole USDC to drip. Optional; defaults to TOKEN_AMOUNT env (10000) for EVM or SOL_USDC_AMOUNT env (100) for Solana.

tx.description: Transaction hash (EVM) or signature (Solana). Format depends on chain; consumers should treat as opaque.

recipient.description: Echoed recipient address. Same shape as the request — full, not truncated.

balanceAfter.description: Post-drip USDC balance as a decimal string (avoids JSON number precision loss for large balances). Optional — the standalone faucet emits it when cheap to compute; smoke tests may relax this requirement.

explorerUrl.description: Direct link to the tx in a chain explorer if the operator has configured EVM_EXPLORER_URL_BASE / SOL_EXPLORER_URL_BASE. Optional.

error.description: Human-readable error message. Stable enough to log and grep on; treat as opaque for branching.

waitMinutes.description: If error == 'rate limit exceeded', the suggested retry delay in minutes. UI uses this OR the Retry-After header (whichever is larger) to render a countdown.

retryable.description: Whether the consumer should retry. True for transient RPC-level errors; false for unrecoverable misconfig (mint not found, etc).

airdropSig.description: If a Solana drip partially succeeded (SOL airdrop went through but the SPL transfer failed), the airdrop signature is surfaced here so the caller knows SOL landed.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the drip was emitted.

txid.description: Tx hash / signature. Opaque per-chain shape.

RecentDripsResponse.description: In-memory ring buffer, sorted desc by ts. Default cap = 100 in the server; per-call limit defaults to 10 (max 100).
